Key Points Covered:
- Early life origins tied to soothing instincts
- Influence on skeletal/facial developments via repeated suction forces To keep focused solely on core medical-relevant facts pertinent directly answering questions posed above concerning causative mechanisms involved specifically around 'thumb-suck' initiation and subsequent impacts thereupon.
